title: Skeleton Keys
author: Riley Black (Brian Switek)
publisher: if you know how to listen. Bone is a marvel
description: "A provocative and entertaining magical mineral tour through the life and afterlife of bone."" --Wall Street Journal Our bones have many stories to tell
subjects: no other part of the human anatomy has such rich scientific and cultural significance
notes: both brimming with life and a potent symbol of death. In this delightful natural and cultural history of bone
